sections.title: Talking in a zone where random events are not allowed

lines.speaker: Dr Jekyll
lines.text: I'll be off now.

lines.speaker: Dr Jekyll
lines.text: Excuse me, I must be off now.

sections.title: Talking to a different player's Dr Jekyll

lines.speaker: Dr Jekyll
lines.text: Sorry, I'm trying to get a herb from [player name], but [he/she] seems to be ignoring me.

lines.speaker: Dr Jekyll
lines.text: Have you got any guam leaf? I've fixed my Hyde problem, so it's not urgent, but I could do with a guam leaf.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have any.

lines.speaker: Dr Jekyll
lines.text: Fair enough. Here, have a spare potion, and thanks for your time.

lines.speaker: Dr Jekyll
lines.text: Have you got any torstol? I've fixed my Hyde problem, so it's not urgent, but I could do with a torstol.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Here you are.

lines.speaker: Dr Jekyll
lines.text: Thank you so much! Here, take this potion in return.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I need it myself.

lines.speaker: Dr Jekyll
lines.text: Fair enough. Here, have a spare potion, and thanks for your time.

lines.speaker: Dr Jekyll

lines.speaker: Dr Jekyll
lines.text: Hello, [player name]. I need a herb.

lines.speaker: Dr Jekyll
lines.text: Hey, [player name]!

lines.speaker: Dr Jekyll
lines.text: Excuse me, [player name]?

lines.speaker: Dr Jekyll
lines.text: Can you hear me, [player name]?

lines.speaker: Dr Jekyll
lines.text: I just need a herb, [player name]!

lines.speaker: Dr Jekyll
lines.text: I'll give you a free potion, [player name]!

lines.speaker: Dr Jekyll
lines.text: Maybe later.
